title: Asgard Shield: Reloaded
description: A Minecraft mod that adds giant swords and shields to the game. A re-make of the original Asgard Shield, made popular by the 1.5 modpack Hexxit.
body:
# Asgard Shield: Reloaded

[![](http://cf.way2muchnoise.eu/full_asgard-shield-reloaded_downloads.svg)](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/asgard-shield-reloaded)
[![](http://cf.way2muchnoise.eu/versions/asgard-shield-reloaded.svg)](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/asgard-shield-reloaded/files)

![The Mod's banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4bbe5cfdb85db10abf3543771a84fca99a65e695_0.webp)

#### Remember that mod from Hexxit? We do!

**Asgard Shield: Reloaded** adds giant swords and shields to the game, made popular by the 1.5 modpack Hexxit.

![Giant Swords Added by the Mod Next to Each Other](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c0d1976dafb7cf5a5922999c5a97b3a3946bb98e.png)

**Giant Swords** deal more damage than the game‘s regular swords, and can block like shields!. They‘re crafted using six pieces of the respective material (wood, cobblestone, iron, gold, diamond, …).

![Shields Added by the Mod Next to Each Other](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b2ac86cf6ef596fb25c434681e2df4fc06009169.png)

**Shields** have special perks and weaknesses, giving each shield its unique purpose. They‘re crafted using leather and six pieces of the respective material and can be upgraded with gold for improved stats.

With the use of both, the player is able to slay their enemies in a much more versatile way.
